title: 311 Service Requests
summary: General city issue reporting and service request guidance.
sample_questions: How do I report a city issue?
I need to file a complaint
Where do I submit a service request?
next_steps: Identify the issue type (trash, road, property, etc.).
Submit a 311 service request using the city reporting path.
Keep a reference number and follow up if unresolved.

title: Sanitation Schedules and Information
summary: Garbage, trash schedules, recycling, and drop-off guidance.
sample_questions: My garbage was not picked up today
next_steps: Check sanitation schedule guidance for your area.
If missed pickup persists, submit a 311 service request.

title: Code Violations
summary: Property and neighborhood code issue guidance.
sample_questions: How do I report a property issue?
There is an abandoned property near me
How do I report a code violation?
next_steps: Describe the property issue clearly (address, photos if allowed).
Use the code violation reporting path or 311 if applicable.
Follow up if not addressed within a reasonable time.
